welcome.salesText:
Manage your construction project in one place.
Control your budget, add photos and track every stage.
welcome.heroTitle: Take control of your construction project

budget.title: Budget management
budget.text: Track planned and actual costs to stay in control.

ai.title: AI manager
ai.text: Ask about budget, stages and decisions. AI helps you spot what matters.

documents.title: Document archive
documents.text: Keep invoices, contracts and files in one place.

project.title: Project management
project.text: Access key data, drawings and a 3D view anytime.

progress.title: Progress tracking
progress.text: Follow stages and know what comes next.

photos.title: Photo documentation
photos.text: Build a visual history of your construction.

join.title: Join a build
join.subtitle: Enter the invitation code from the build owner. After registration or login, we will connect you with the project.
join.registerAction: I do not have an account - sign me up
join.loginAction: I have an account - log me in
join.invalidCode: This invitation code is invalid or has expired.
join.validationError: Could not check the code. Please try again.

alerts.resetMessage: Enter your email above, then click again.
alerts.errorMessage: Could not send the link. Please try again.
alerts.doneMessage: We sent a password reset link to the provided email.
alerts.soonMessage: Google login will be available in the app build.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

alerts.checkEmailMessage: We sent a confirmation link. After clicking it, return to the app and log in.
alerts.soonMessage: Google registration/login will be available in the app build.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.userAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
errors.generic: Could not create account. Please try again.

errors.noSessionData: Missing session data in the auth callback
errors.recoveryFailed: Could not open the password reset link.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.

errors.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.updateFailed: Could not update the password. Please try again.

success.title: Password updated
success.message: Your new password has been saved.

inviteJoin.convertWarningMessage: You already have your own build on this account. If you join as a partner, we will delete your current build and its data: budget, documents, photos, journal, tasks and project.
inviteJoin.convertAction: Yes, delete my build and join
inviteJoin.invalidMessage: This invite is invalid or has expired.
